mapper.select: SELECT step_id, agent_code, step_order, step_name, step_type, tool_name, instruction, config_json, failure_policy, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_agent_step WHERE agent_code = #{agentCode} ORDER BY step_order ASC, step_id ASC

SELECT step_id, agent_code, step_order, step_name, step_type, tool_name, instruction, config_json, failure_policy, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM ai_agent_step WHERE step_id = #{stepId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_step (agent_code, step_order, step_name, step_type, tool_name, instruction, config_json, failure_policy, enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{agentCode}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepName}, #{stepType}, #{toolName}, #{instruction}, #{configJson}, #{failurePolicy}, #{enabled}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
